titleStmt.title: SII 7.213: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 213. (A.R. No. 43 of 1901). ON A THIRD SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanavikyāta sōmakulatilaka pāṁ
ḍya mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyaratnākaraṁ saraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ śrīmaṁjunāthadē
vara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaruma
ppa śrīmatpāṁḍyacakravartti Arirāya basavasaṁkhara rā
yagajāṁkuśa hulirāya gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa śrīmatpra
tāpacakravartti hoyisaḷa śrīvīranārasiṁhādhīṁdradē
varasara kumāra śrīvīraballāḷadēvarugaḷu prithuvī
rājyaṁ geyyutirdda visu saṁvatsarada makaramā
saṁ 15 neya guruvāradaṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhāna
dēvappadaṁṇāyakara maiduna hariyappadaṁṇāyaka
ruṁ hosabaḍahara maga mādaḍaharuṁ Atikāri dēva
ti Āḷuvaruṁ sālikeya Aruvaru ballāḷugaḷuṁ A
yvaru horahinavaruṁ . bidireya nagaradalu Eṁṭu
mānisaseṭṭikāraruṁ nālvaru Eḷamegaḷuṁ Asēsa
holāradhavaruṁ Ū Eraḍukōla baḷiyū nā
ḍuṁ nakararū taṁmoḷēkastarāgi māḍida sāsana kra
ma veṁteṁdaḍe yiṁtī dharmmada kalliṁdoḷage Āyudhavanu
Are kittavaṁge Arasiṁge teruva ga 51 nera kittavaṁge
horage kaḍidavaṁge ga 500 koṁdava ga se Arasiṁge Ā
tana jīva jīvaṁge taḷa baḷaṁjigarige halaru makaḷa kaiya
li tappidaḍe 1 tale sāvira hoṁnu Arasiṁge teru
varu . kaitappu māḍidātanallade Ātana taṁ
ya māḍi baṁdu kettidalli tappi naḍasalāgadu . naka
radoḷaguḷḷa [Aṭṭavaṭṭavanu] ṭṭaḍe baḷaṁja nītiṁgeThe following two lines are completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 7.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
